cache\_creation: optional [BetaManagedAgentsCacheCreationUsage](api/beta.md) { ephemeral\_1h\_input\_tokens, ephemeral\_5m\_input\_tokens } о‚љ

Prompt-cache creation token usage broken down by cache lifetime.

ephemeral\_1h\_input\_tokens: optional numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create 1-hour ephemeral cache entries.

ephemeral\_5m\_input\_tokens: optional numberо‚љ

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: optional numberо‚љ

input\_tokens: optional numberо‚љ

output\_tokens: optional numberо‚љ

Total output tokens generated across all turns.

vault\_ids: array of stringо‚љ

Vault IDs attached to the session at creation. Empty when no vaults were supplied.

deployment\_id: optional stringо‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionAgentUpdate object { mcp\_servers, tools } о‚љ

Mid-session agent configuration update. Only `tools` and `mcp_servers` are updatable. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. To preserve existing entries, GET the session, modify the array, and POST it back.

оЂЄ

mcp\_servers: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsURLMCPServerParams](api/beta.md) { name, type, url } о‚љ

Replacement MCP server list. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. Send an empty array to clear; omit to preserve.

name: stringо‚љ

Unique name for this server, referenced by mcp\_toolset configurations. 1-255 characters.

type: "url"о‚љ

url: stringо‚љ

Endpoint URL for the MCP server.

оЂЄ

tools: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Params](api/beta.md) { type, configs, default\_config }  or [BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetParams](api/beta.md) { mcp\_server\_name, type, configs, default\_config }  or [BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams](api/beta.md) { description, input\_schema, name, type } о‚љ

Replacement tool list. Full replacement: the provided array becomes the new value. Send an empty array to clear; omit to preserve.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Params object { type, configs, default\_config } о‚љ

Configuration for built-in agent tools. Use this to enable or disable groups of tools available to the agent.

type: "agent\_toolset\_20260401"о‚љ

оЂЄ

configs: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolConfigParams](api/beta.md) { name, enabled, permission\_policy } о‚љ

Per-tool configuration overrides.

"bash"о‚љ

"edit"о‚љ

"read"о‚љ

"write"о‚љ

"glob"о‚љ

"grep"о‚љ

Whether this tool is enabled and available to Claude. Overrides the default\_config setting.

permission\_policy: optional [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy object { type } о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy object { type } о‚љ

Tool calls require user confirmation before execution.

type: "always\_ask"о‚љ

Default configuration for all tools in a toolset.

enabled: optional booleanо‚љ

Whether tools are enabled and available to Claude by default. Defaults to true if not specified.

permission\_policy: optional [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetParams object { mcp\_server\_name, type, configs, default\_config } о‚љ

Configuration for tools from an MCP server defined in `mcp_servers`.

mcp\_server\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP server. Must match a server name from the mcp\_servers array. 1-255 characters.

type: "mcp\_toolset"о‚љ

оЂЄ

configs: optional array of [BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolConfigParams](api/beta.md) { name, enabled, permission\_policy } о‚љ

Per-tool configuration overrides.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP tool to configure. 1-128 characters.

enabled: optional booleanо‚љ

Whether this tool is enabled. Overrides the `default_config` setting.

оЂЄ

permission\_policy: optional [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

enabled: optional booleanо‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams object { description, input\_schema, name, type } о‚љ

A custom tool that is executed by the API client rather than the agent. When the agent calls this tool, an `agent.custom_tool_use` event is emitted and the session goes idle, waiting for the client to provide the result via a `user.custom_tool_result` event.

description: stringо‚љ

Description of what the tool does, shown to the agent to help it decide when to use the tool. 1-1024 characters.

оЂЄ

input\_schema: [BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolInputSchema](api/beta.md) { type, properties, required } о‚љ

JSON Schema for custom tool input parameters.

type: "object"о‚љ

properties: optional map[unknown]о‚љ

required: optional array of stringо‚љ

name: stringо‚љ

Unique name for the tool. 1-128 characters; letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

type: "custom"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionStats object { active\_seconds, duration\_seconds } о‚љ

Timing statistics for a session.

active\_seconds: optional numberо‚љ

Cumulative time in seconds the session spent in running status. Excludes idle time.

duration\_seconds: optional numberо‚љ

Elapsed time since session creation in seconds. For terminated sessions, frozen at the final update.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.updated"о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

#### BetaSessionsEvents

##### [List Events](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events

##### [Send Events](api/beta/sessions/events/send.md)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events

##### [Stream Events](api/beta/sessions/events/stream.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/events/stream

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: map[unknown]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

BetaManagedAgentsBillingError object { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

The caller's organization or workspace cannot make model requests вЂ” out of credits or spend limit reached. Retrying with the same credentials will not succeed; the caller must resolve the billing state.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "billing\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCredentialHostUnreachableError object { credential\_id, message, retry\_status, 2 more } о‚љ

An `environment_variable` credential's `auth.networking.allowed_hosts` includes a host the environment's network policy does not permit.

credential\_id: stringо‚љ

ID of the affected credential.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "credential\_host\_unreachable\_error"о‚љ

vault\_id: stringо‚љ

ID of the vault containing the affected credential.

Parameters for sending an interrupt to pause the agent.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEventParams object { tool\_use\_id, type, content, is\_error } о‚љ

Parameters for providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams object { content, type } о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оЂЄ

content: array of [BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } о‚љ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsMCPAuthenticationFailedError object { mcp\_server\_name, message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

Authentication to an MCP server failed.

mcp\_server\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the MCP server that failed authentication.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "mcp\_authentication\_failed\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" or "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message: optional stringо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent object { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"о‚љ

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" or "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message: optional stringо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent object { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: map[unknown]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оЂЄ

type: "text"о‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.message"о‚љ

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

оЂЄ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"о‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: numberо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

оЂЄ

stop\_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](api/beta.md) { event\_ids, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: "end\_turn"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: array of stringо‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } о‚љ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"о‚љ

type: "session.thread\_status\_idle"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusTerminatedEvent object { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

A session thread has terminated and will accept no further input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that terminated.

type: "session.thread\_status\_terminated"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent object { id, tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_result"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } о‚љ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.updated"о‚љ

"claude-opus-4-8"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: array of stringо‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } о‚љ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"о‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" or "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message: optional stringо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: map[unknown]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentThinkingEvent object { id, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

Indicates the agent is making forward progress via extended thinking. A progress signal, not a content carrier.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEvent object { id, input, mcp\_server\_name, 5 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a tool provided by an MCP server.

Unique identifier for this event.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

evaluated\_permission: optional "allow" or "ask" or "deny"о‚љ

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"ask"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent object { id, error, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

error: [BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError](api/beta.md) { message, retry\_status, type }  or 5 moreо‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "unknown\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsModelOverloadedError object { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

The model is currently overloaded. Emitted after automatic retries are exhausted.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "model\_overloaded\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsModelRateLimitedError object { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

The model request was rate-limited.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "model\_rate\_limited\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsModelRequestFailedError object { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

A model request failed for a reason other than overload or rate-limiting.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "model\_request\_failed\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"о‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: numberо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent object { id, content, type, processed\_at } о‚љ

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

content: array of [BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } о‚љ

System content blocks. Text-only.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams object { content, type } о‚љ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оЂЄ

content: array of [BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md) { text, type } о‚љ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock object { text, type } о‚љ

Regular text content.

text: stringо‚љ

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric object { content, type } о‚љ

Rubric content provided inline as text.

content: stringо‚љ

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown вЂ” the grader treats it as freeform text.

type: "text"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsTextRubricParams object { content, type } о‚љ

Rubric content provided inline as text.

content: stringо‚љ

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown вЂ” the grader treats it as freeform text. Maximum 262144 characters.

type: "text"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError object { message, retry\_status, type } о‚љ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: stringо‚љ

Human-readable error description.

оЂЄ

retry\_status: [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: "terminal"о‚љ

type: "unknown\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: numberо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventParams object { type, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

Parameters for sending an interrupt to pause the agent.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" or "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message: optional stringо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParams object { result, tool\_use\_id, type, deny\_message } о‚љ

Parameters for confirming or denying a tool execution request.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" or "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message: optional stringо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEventParams object { tool\_use\_id, type, content, is\_error } о‚љ

Parameters for providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

type: "user.tool\_result"о‚љ

#### BetaSessionsResources

##### [Add Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/add.md)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources

##### [List Session Resources](api/beta/sessions/resources/list.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources

##### [Get Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

##### [Update Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/update.md)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

##### [Delete Session Resource](api/beta/sessions/resources/delete.md)

DELETE/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/resources/{resource\_id}

#### BetaSessionsThreads

##### [List Session Threads](api/beta/sessions/threads/list.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads

##### [Get Session Thread](api/beta/sessions/threads/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}

##### [Archive Session Thread](api/beta/sessions/threads/archive.md)

POST/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}/archive

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThread object { id, agent, archived\_at, 8 more } о‚љ

An execution thread within a `session`. Each session has one primary thread plus zero or more child threads spawned by the coordinator.

Unique identifier for this thread.

agent: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadAgent](api/beta.md) { id, description, mcp\_servers, 7 more } о‚љ

Resolved `agent` definition for a single `session_thread`. Snapshot of the agent at thread creation time. The multiagent roster is not repeated here; read it from `Session.agent`.

id: stringо‚љ

description: stringо‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent object { id, type, processed\_at, session\_thread\_id } о‚љ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: "user.interrupt"о‚љ

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent object { id, result, tool\_use\_id, 4 more } о‚љ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

result: "allow" or "deny"о‚љ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"о‚љ

"deny"о‚љ

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_confirmation"о‚љ

deny\_message: optional stringо‚љ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent object { id, custom\_tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.custom\_tool\_result"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent object { id, input, name, 3 more } о‚љ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: map[unknown]о‚љ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: stringо‚љ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.custom\_tool\_use"о‚љ

session\_thread\_id: optional stringо‚љ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "agent.message"о‚љ

Human-readable error description.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying object { type } о‚љ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: "retrying"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted object { type } о‚љ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: "exhausted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal object { type } о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } о‚љ

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: "session.thread\_created"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent object { id, explanation, iteration, 6 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вЂ” no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: stringо‚љ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: stringо‚љ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вЂ” one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: "span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"о‚љ

оЂЄ

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) { cache\_creation\_input\_tokens, cache\_read\_input\_tokens, input\_tokens, 2 more } о‚љ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: numberо‚љ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оЂЄ

speed: optional "standard" or "fast"о‚љ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"о‚љ

"fast"о‚љ

оЂЄ

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent object { id, iteration, outcome\_id, 2 more } о‚љ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: numberо‚љ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent object { id, description, max\_iterations, 4 more } о‚љ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: stringо‚љ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: numberо‚љ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: stringо‚љ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionDeletedEvent object { id, processed\_at, type } о‚љ

Emitted when a session has been deleted. Terminates any active event stream вЂ” no further events will be emitted for this session.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.deleted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRunningEvent object { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

A session thread has begun executing. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that started running.

type: "session.thread\_status\_running"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent object { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 3 more } о‚љ

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

оЂЄ

stop\_reason: [BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction](api/beta.md) { event\_ids, type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted](api/beta.md) { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn object { type } о‚љ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: "end\_turn"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction object { event\_ids, type } о‚љ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: array of stringо‚љ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: "requires\_action"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted object { type } о‚љ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: "retries\_exhausted"о‚љ

type: "session.thread\_status\_idle"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusTerminatedEvent object { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

A session thread has terminated and will accept no further input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that terminated.

type: "session.thread\_status\_terminated"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent object { id, tool\_use\_id, type, 4 more } о‚љ

Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

tool\_use\_id: stringо‚љ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: "user.tool\_result"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRescheduledEvent object { id, agent\_name, processed\_at, 2 more } о‚љ

A session thread hit a transient error and is retrying automatically. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: stringо‚љ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that is retrying.

type: "session.thread\_status\_rescheduled"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent object { id, processed\_at, type, 3 more } о‚љ

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: "session.updated"о‚љ

"claude-opus-4-8"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-7"о‚љ

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

"claude-opus-4-6"о‚љ

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

"claude-sonnet-4-6"о‚љ

type: "custom"о‚љ

type: "agent"о‚љ

version: numberо‚љ

metadata: optional map[string]о‚љ

The session's full metadata bag after the update. Present when the update set non-empty metadata; absent when metadata was unchanged or cleared to empty.

title: optional stringо‚љ

The session's new title. Present only when the update changed it.

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for this event.

оЂЄ

System content blocks. Text-only.

The text content.

type: "text"о‚љ

type: "system.message"о‚љ

processed\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

#### BetaSessionsThreadsEvents

##### [List Session Thread Events](api/beta/sessions/threads/events/list.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}/events

##### [Stream Session Thread Events](api/beta/sessions/threads/events/stream.md)

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}/stream

#### BetaDeployments

##### [Create Deployment](api/beta/deployments/create.md)

POST/v1/deployments

##### [List Deployments](api/beta/deployments/list.md)

GET/v1/deployments

##### [Get Deployment](api/beta/deployments/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}

##### [Update Deployment](api/beta/deployments/update.md)

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}

##### [Archive Deployment](api/beta/deployments/archive.md)

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/archive

##### [Run Deployment Now](api/beta/deployments/run.md)

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/run

##### [Pause Deployment](api/beta/deployments/pause.md)

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/pause

##### [Unpause Deployment](api/beta/deployments/unpause.md)

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/unpause

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsAgentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError object { type } о‚љ

The deployment's agent was archived.

type: "agent\_archived\_error"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCronSchedule object { expression, timezone, type, 2 more } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: "cron"о‚љ

last\_run\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at: optional array of stringо‚љ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCronScheduleParams object { expression, timezone, type } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

type: "cron"о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsFileNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError object { type } о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError object { type } о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsWorkspaceArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError object { type } о‚љ

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfig object { memory\_store\_id, type, access, instructions } о‚љ

"read\_only"о‚љ

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

schedule: [BetaManagedAgentsSchedule](api/beta.md) { expression, timezone, type, 2 more } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: "cron"о‚љ

last\_run\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at: optional array of stringо‚љ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

BetaManagedAgentsSchedule object { expression, timezone, type, 2 more } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: "cron"о‚љ

last\_run\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at: optional array of stringо‚љ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsScheduleParams object { expression, timezone, type } о‚љ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

expression: stringо‚љ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: stringо‚љ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

type: "cron"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsSelfHostedResourcesUnsupportedDeploymentPausedReasonError object { type } о‚љ

The deployment configures resources, but its environment is self-hosted and cannot mount them.

type: "self\_hosted\_resources\_unsupported\_error"о‚љ

networking: [BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingResponse](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingResponse](api/beta.md) { allowed\_hosts, type } о‚љ

Outbound hosts the secret value is substituted on.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingResponse object { type } о‚љ

The secret is substituted on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to.

type: "unrestricted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingResponse object { allowed\_hosts, type } о‚љ

The secret is substituted only on requests to the listed hosts.

allowed\_hosts: array of stringо‚љ

Hostnames on which the secret will be substituted. An entry matches the request host exactly; a `*.`-prefixed entry matches any subdomain of the named domain but not the domain itself.

type: "limited"о‚љ

secret\_name: stringо‚љ

Name of the environment variable.

type: "environment\_variable"о‚љ

created\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

metadata: map[string]о‚љ

Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the credential.

type: "vault\_credential"о‚љ

updated\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

vault\_id: stringо‚љ

Identifier of the vault this credential belongs to.

display\_name: optional stringо‚љ

Human-readable name for the credential.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCredentialNetworkingParams = [BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingParams](api/beta.md) { type }  or [BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingParams](api/beta.md) { allowed\_hosts, type } о‚љ

Substitute the secret on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to. The Environment's network policy is the only boundary on where the secret can reach.

One of the following:

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingParams object { type } о‚љ

Substitute the secret on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to. The Environment's network policy is the only boundary on where the secret can reach.

type: "unrestricted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingParams object { allowed\_hosts, type } о‚љ

Substitute the secret only on requests to the listed hosts.

allowed\_hosts: array of stringо‚љ

Hostnames on which the secret will be substituted. Each entry is a bare hostname (`api.example.com`), an IPv4 address (`192.0.2.1`), or a `*.`-prefixed wildcard (`*.example.com`). URLs, ports, paths, and IPv6 addresses are not accepted. At most 16 entries.

type: "limited"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsCredentialValidation object { credential\_id, has\_refresh\_token, mcp\_probe, 5 more } о‚љ

Result of live-probing a credential against its configured MCP server.

HTTP status code.

http\_response: [BetaManagedAgentsRefreshHTTPResponse](api/beta.md) { body, body\_truncated, content\_type, status\_code } о‚љ

#### BetaMemory Stores

##### [Create a memory store](api/beta/memory_stores/create.md)

POST/v1/memory\_stores

##### [List memory stores](api/beta/memory_stores/list.md)

GET/v1/memory\_stores

##### [Retrieve a memory store](api/beta/memory_stores/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}

##### [Update a memory store](api/beta/memory_stores/update.md)

POST/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}

##### [Delete a memory store](api/beta/memory_stores/delete.md)

DELETE/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}

##### [Archive a memory store](api/beta/memory_stores/archive.md)

POST/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}/archive

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemoryStore object { id, type } о‚љ

Confirmation that a `memory_store` was deleted.

id: stringо‚љ

ID of the deleted memory store (a `memstore_...` identifier). The store and all its memories and versions are no longer retrievable.

type: "memory\_store\_deleted"о‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore object { id, created\_at, name, 5 more } о‚љ

A `memory_store`: a named container for agent memories, scoped to a workspace. Attach a store to a session via `resources[]` to mount it as a directory the agent can read and write.

id: stringо‚љ

Unique identifier for the memory store (a `memstore_...` tagged ID). Use this when attaching the store to a session, or in the `{memory_store_id}` path parameter of subsequent calls.

created\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

name: stringо‚љ

Human-readable name for the store. 1вЂ“255 characters. The store's mount-path slug under `/mnt/memory/` is derived from this name.

type: "memory\_store"о‚љ

updated\_at: stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

archived\_at: optional stringо‚љ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

description: optional stringо‚љ

Free-text description of what the store contains, up to 1024 characters. Included in the agent's system prompt when the store is attached, so word it to be useful to the agent. Empty string when unset.

metadata: optional map[string]о‚љ

Arbitrary key-value tags for your own bookkeeping (such as the end user a store belongs to). Up to 16 pairs; keys 1вЂ“64 characters; values up to 512 characters. Returned on retrieve/list but not filterable.

#### BetaMemory StoresMemories

##### [Create a memory](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/create.md)

POST/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}/memories

##### [List memories](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/list.md)

GET/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}/memories

##### [Retrieve a memory](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/retrieve.md)

GET/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}/memories/{memory\_id}

##### [Update a memory](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/update.md)

POST/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}/memories/{memory\_id}

##### [Delete a memory](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/delete.md)

DELETE/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}/memories/{memory\_id}

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsConflictError object { type, message } о‚љ

type: "conflict\_error"о‚љ

message: optional stringо‚љ

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsContentSha256Precondition object { type, content\_sha256 } о‚љ

Optimistic-concurrency precondition: the update applies only if the memory's stored `content_sha256` equals the supplied value. On mismatch, the request returns `memory_precondition_failed_error` (HTTP 409); re-read the memory and retry against the fresh state. If the precondition fails but the stored state already exactly matches the requested `content` and `path`, the server returns 200 instead of 409.

type: "content\_sha256"о‚љ

content\_sha256: optional stringо‚љ

Expected `content_sha256` of the stored memory (64 lowercase hexadecimal characters). Typically the `content_sha256` returned by a prior read or list call. Because the server applies no content normalization, clients can also compute this locally as the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 content bytes.

оЂЄ

BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemory object { id, type } о‚љ

Tombstone returned by [Delete a memory](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/delete.md). The memory's version history persists and remains listable via [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md) until the store itself is deleted.

id: stringо‚љ

ID of the deleted memory (a `mem_...` value).

type: "memory\_deleted"о‚љ
